name: Air Fighter 3D
description: Climb into the cockpit of your favorite fighter aircraft, get ready to take-off, and soar into the skies brimming with visceral dogfights! Fly solo as a lone wolf or command a fleet of acrobatic aircraft to establish air superiority over the battlefield. Perform dizzying acrobatic maneuvers, get the enemy in your sights, and hit the trigger to shoot them down. Become the supreme lord of the skies in Air Fighters 3D now! Play modern air fighter 3d in the air fighter jet fighter combat game to become sky warriors of fighter jet games with missions 3d offline to fly jet dogfight games of modern warplanes pvp warfare jet fighter planes flying
instructions: Tap and Hold left mouse button drag to the left right to change position
